title: India: Union Minister Pralhad Joshi Inaugurates 1st Green Hydrogen R&D Conference; Launches â‚¹100 Crore Call for Proposals for Start-Ups
content: Union Minister of New and Renewable Energy, Shri Pralhad Joshi, inaugurated the 1st Annual Green Hydrogen R&D Conference organised by Ministry of New and Renewable Energy in New Delhi and launched a new â‚¹100 crore Call for Proposals to support start-ups in hydrogen innovation. The scheme will provide up to â‚¹5 crore per project for pilot projects in innovative hydrogen production, storage, transport and utilisation technologies. At the conference, 25 start-ups are showcasing their innovations, ranging from electrolyser manufacturing to AI-driven optimisation and biological hydrogen solutions.
author: Analysts Account
